channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trump administration plans to pressure the IOC to come up with a uniform transgender athlete ban
item.description: President Donald Trump is ready to take his fight against transgender athletes to the International Olympic Committee.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lindsey Vonn hooks a gate with her arm and doesn't finish her opening race at skiing worlds
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — Lindsey Vonn briefly lost feeling in right arm after getting it hooked on a gate that took her out of her opening race at the Alpine skiing world championships on Thursday, having competed in the super-G despite feeling sick.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Blitzing with 'Spags': Chiefs defensive coordinator Steve Spagnuolo, the mad scientist of pass rush
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Every once in a while, when an unsuspecting offense is least expecting it, Kansas City Chiefs safety Justin Reid will inch his way toward the line of scrimmage, then take off like a thunderbolt toward the quarterback the moment the ball is snapped.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes reveals thoughts on Trump attending the Super Bowl
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes was asked what it will feel like to play in front of a sitting president.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Petrulis, NewsNation

item.title: Travis Kelce fined for unsportsmanlike conduct in AFC title game
item.description: While there was no flag thrown on the play, Kelce got hit with an $11,255 fine for unsportsmanlike conduct after a one-yard Mahomes rushing touchdown
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Influencers, retired Bay Area sports stars headline NBA All-Star Celebrity Game in Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA released the list of celebrities that will take the floor in Oakland for the NBA All-Star Celebrity Game on Feb. 14. A combination of influencers, retired athletes, film stars and more will put their basketball skills to test.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Report: Bears GM Ryan Poles expected to receive 3-year contract extension, according to team source
item.description: The Bears are expected to extend general manager Ryan Poles' contract for three more years, in order to align it with the contract signed by new head coach Ben Johnson, according to a feature story this week by ESPN Bears reporter Courtney Cronin. Cronin published a feature story Monday at ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: MLB ump fired amid gambling probe
item.description: Major League Baseball has fired an umpire as part of an investigation into sports gambling. Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball, according to ESPN reporter Jesse Rogers and later confirmed by the league.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Report: Bulls trade Zach LaVine to Kings
item.description: The Chicago Bulls are trading star shooting guard Zach LaVine to the Sacramento Kings, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Iowa honors Caitlin Clark by retiring her number and hanging it in the rafters
item.description: Clark returned to Iowa’s Carver-Hawkeye Arena on Sunday to have her number 22 retired in a ceremony after the Hawkeyes’ 76-67 win over No. 4 USC, one season after she completed her historic college career.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Stunning trade sends Luka Doncic to Lakers, Anthony Davis to Mavericks
item.description: In what is one of the more surreal trades in the history of professional sports, the Los Angeles Lakers have sent away one of its franchise legends in exchange for a young superstar.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Rowdies Forrest Lasso returns to field after season-ending injury
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) - The Tampa Bay Rowdies returned to the field this week for preseason and so did veteran defender Forrest Lasso. After scoring two goals May 18, 2024, Lasso was named Player of the Week for his performance.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brotherly love; UCSD's basketball brother-duo team up
item.description: Out at UC San Diego, the Tritons have been riding a wave of success this season as they currently sit at 17-4 with their eyes set on taking the Big West. A team fueled by relationships that go deeper than you may even know, UCSD guard Chris Howell and Assistant Coach Mikey Howell teaming up.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, NewsNation

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9
